Easy Billing Our retail and supermarket POS software offers a smart, user-friendly experience with a clear, intuitive interface and efficient search features. The system includes a single checkout scr...

Our Supermarket ERP Software increases productivity, automates accounting and tracks inventory.

Easy Billing Our retail and supermarket POS software offers a smart, user-friendly experience with a clear, intuitive interface and efficient search features. The system includes a single checkout screen for seamless sales transactions and provides easy access to all commonly used task icons. Effortlessly track sales by item to monitor stock levels and know when to reorder. Manage inventory using FIFO or Weighted Average methods, and benefit from automatic inventory updates based on sales data. This ensures precise inventory control, prevents stockouts, and keeps your operations running smoothly with real-time updates and accurate stock management.

Easy Billing

Our retail and supermarket POS software offers a smart, user-friendly experience with a clear, intuitive interface and efficient search features. The system includes a single checkout screen for seamless sales transactions and provides easy access to all commonly used task icons. Effortlessly track sales by item to monitor stock levels and know when to reorder. Manage inventory using FIFO or Weighted Average methods, and benefit from automatic inventory updates based on sales data. This ensures precise inventory control, prevents stockouts, and keeps your operations running smoothly with real-time updates and accurate stock management.

Multiple Locations

Manage your business across multiple locations simultaneously with real-time data on purchases and sales using our advanced supermarket ERP software. Empower your back-office employees with the flexibility to work from home as needed. Easily expand your operations by creating multiple stores or warehouses under one company, with the ability to hold or sell stock from each location. Our system tracks inventory and valuation rates per site, offering detailed insights into stock levels and financial metrics. Configure reports to analyze expenses, stock movements, and profitability by location, ensuring comprehensive oversight and optimized performance across all your business units.

Multiple Sales Channels

Our supermarket ERP software efficiently manages both B2B retail sales and B2C wholesale operations with ease. It includes comprehensive credit facility management to handle all types of credit-based customers, ensuring smooth financial transactions. Retail businesses can utilize cloud server connectivity to extend their point of sale to any location worldwide. With just a few clicks, you can quickly set up and manage new sales channels, regardless of location. This flexibility enhances your ability to reach customers globally and streamline operations, all while maintaining control over both retail and wholesale aspects of your business.

Comprehensive Inventory Control

Minimize business losses with tight inventory control using our supermarket store management software. Effectively reduce theft, misplacement, and incorrect valuation that impact your current assets. Our comprehensive stock and inventory control module enhances operational efficiency by tracking items from purchase through warehousing to sales. Choose between FIFO or Moving Average methods for accurate valuation. The integrated inventory system provides a real-time view of product availability, stock levels across warehouses, and stock transfers. This ensures you maintain optimal stock levels, prevent damage, and streamline inventory management, ultimately safeguarding your assets and improving overall business performance.

Total Accounting

Our supermarket ERP software is supported by a robust international standard accounting system, ensuring full compliance with IFRS standards. The system automates ledger entries, minimizing manual data entry and enhancing accuracy. Key features include a comprehensive Chart of Accounts, management of Opening Account Balances, Taxes, Advance Payments, Budgeting, and Subscription Management. It offers automatic VAT calculations and generates VAT reports in accordance with local taxation laws. Detailed Profit and Loss statements and Balance Sheets can be analyzed by branch. Additionally, Accounts Payable and Receivable reports help manage cash flow effectively, while precise item valuation, including all indirect costs, ensures accurate profitability assessments.

Customer Management

Efficiently manage and communicate with all your customers using detailed information readily available in our system. Utilize email to notify customers of new promotions or send personalized greetings on special occasions. Create customer records quickly and easily in the database for streamlined management. The POS customer contact system enables retail shops to categorize customers in various ways for targeted communication. Manage customer credit limits effectively and access detailed payment aging reports by customer, allowing you to monitor and optimize credit management and cash flow. This comprehensive approach helps enhance customer relationships, improve communication, and drive business growth.

Offline Point of Sales Terminal

Ensure uninterrupted sales operations even during internet disruptions with our robust Point of Sale (POS) system. Users can continue serving customers seamlessly without affecting sales transactions. Once the internet connection is restored, the system automatically synchronizes data, posting both accounting and stock entries. Our POS module features a clear, intuitive interface with easy search capabilities and a single checkout screen for efficient sales transactions and commonly used tasks. Compatible with any device, our user-friendly POS software is highly flexible and fully integrated with your inventory for real-time retail management. This ensures a smooth, reliable, and efficient sales process at all times.

Supermarket ERP Software

Our comprehensive software is designed to manage your retail supermarket and warehouses effectively. It offers extensive features, including purchase, sales, stock management, and accounting, to cover all your operational needs. Over the years, we have dedicated significant effort to customizing our application to meet local business requirements and ensure optimal performance. However, we recognize that some businesses have unique needs. We recommend customizing the software only when these specific requirements are significant and the benefits of customization outweigh the associated costs. This approach ensures that your investment delivers maximum value and enhances operational efficiency.
